title: URL Shortener
googleRelevance: Google operates goo.gl and Firebase Dynamic Links, requiring the same hash-collision-free encoding and redirect latency guarantees at global scale.

title: Rate Limiter
googleRelevance: Every Google API surface (Maps, YouTube Data API, Cloud APIs) enforces per-client quotas, making rate-limiter design a first-class infrastructure concern.

title: Key-Value Store
googleRelevance: Google's Bigtable is a wide-column key-value store that underpins Gmail, Google Search indexing, and Google Analytics at planetary scale.

title: News Feed
googleRelevance: Google Discover serves personalized content feeds to over a billion users daily, sharing the fan-out-on-write vs. fan-out-on-read trade-offs central to this design.

title: Web Crawler
googleRelevance: Googlebot is one of the largest distributed crawlers ever built, making politeness policies, deduplication, and crawl scheduling core to Google Search infrastructure.

title: Search Autocomplete
googleRelevance: Google Search's autocomplete (Google Suggest) must return ranked completions in under 100 ms for billions of queries daily, making trie vs. prefix-index trade-offs directly applicable.

title: Notification System
googleRelevance: Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) delivers billions of push notifications daily across Android, iOS, and web, requiring the same fan-out and delivery-guarantee decisions covered in this design.

title: Distributed Cache
googleRelevance: Google uses a proprietary distributed cache called 'Memcache at Scale' (documented in a 2013 NSDI paper) to absorb billions of reads per second across their data centers.

title: Ride-Sharing Backend
googleRelevance: Google Maps Platform provides the location, routing, and ETA services that every ride-sharing company (including Waymo) relies on, making geo-indexing and real-time matching directly relevant.

title: Video Streaming Platform
googleRelevance: YouTube, owned by Google, streams over 500 hours of video uploaded per minute to 2 billion users, making CDN design, adaptive bitrate streaming, and encoding pipelines core Google infrastructure problems.
